mapper.select: SELECT r.reservation_id, r.user_id, r.status AS reservation_status, u.name AS customer_name, u.email AS customer_email, r.quoted_price, r.discount_price, COALESCE(NULLIF(r.discount_price, 0), r.quoted_price) AS payable_amount FROM reservations r JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.user_id WHERE r.reservation_id = #{reservationId} AND r.deleted_at IS NULL AND u.deleted_at IS NULL FOR UPDATE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO payments ( reservation_id, user_id, order_id, order_name, payment_type, status, total_amount, balance_amount, platform_fee, requested_at ) VALUES ( #{reservationId}, #{userId}, #{orderId}, #{orderName}, #{paymentType}, #{status}, #{totalAmount}, #{balanceAmount}, #{platformFee}, #{requestedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT payment_id, reservation_id, user_id, payment_key, order_id, order_name, payment_type, method, status, total_amount, balance_amount, platform_fee, last_transaction_key, is_partial_cancelable, requested_at, approved_at, receipt_url, failure_code, failure_message, raw_response, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM payments WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE payments SET payment_key = #{paymentKey}, method = #{method}, status = #{status}, balance_amount = #{balanceAmount}, last_transaction_key = #{lastTransactionKey}, is_partial_cancelable = #{isPartialCancelable}, requested_at = #{requestedAt}, approved_at = #{approvedAt}, receipt_url = #{receiptUrl}, raw_response = #{rawResponse}, failure_code = NULL, failure_message = NULL, updated_at = NOW() WHERE payment_id = #{paymentId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE payments SET status = #{status}, failure_code = #{failureCode}, failure_message = #{failureMessage}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE payment_id = #{paymentId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE reservations SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE reservation_id = #{reservationId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT total_amount FROM payments WHERE reservation_id = #{reservationId} AND payment_type = 'DEPOSIT' AND status = 'DONE' AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY payment_id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM payments WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT * FROM payments WHERE payment_id = #{paymentId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE payments SET payment_key = #{paymentKey}, method = #{method}, status = #{status}, total_amount = #{totalAmount}, balance_amount = #{balanceAmount}, receipt_url = #{receiptUrl}, approved_at = #{approvedAt}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE payment_id = #{paymentId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT payment_id, reservation_id, user_id, payment_key, order_id, order_name, payment_type, method, status, total_amount, balance_amount, platform_fee, last_transaction_key, is_partial_cancelable, requested_at, approved_at, receipt_url, failure_code, failure_message, raw_response, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM payments WHERE reservation_id = #{reservationId} AND payment_type = #{paymentType} AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE
